column1: INSTRUCTIONS ON NAVIGATING FROM THE TABLE OF CONTENTS TO THE DESIRED LOCATION IN THE RESOURCE SHEET: HOVER OVER THE DESIRED CELL, OR TAP THE CELL ON A MOBILE DEVICE AND CLICK THE LINK THAT APPEARS. YOU WILL BE TAKEN TO THE LOCATION IN THE RESOURCE SHEET. ON A MOBILE DEVICE, TAPPING ON A CELL CAUSES THE BOTTOM TABS TO DISAPPEAR. TAP THE CHECK ON THE TOP LEFT TO SEE THE TABS AGAIN.
